diagram_title: A4 — Rewire Imports and Delete anthropic.ts

activities.title: Update plugin/index.ts import
activities.description: Change: import { AnthropicAuthPlugin } from './anthropic' → import { ClaudeCliPlugin } from './claude-cli'

activities.title: Update plugin/claude-native.ts import
activities.description: Change: import { AnthropicAuthPlugin } from './anthropic' → import { ClaudeCliPlugin } from './claude-cli'. Update wrapper logic.

activities.title: Delete plugin/anthropic.ts
activities.description: Remove the 624-line file entirely. All live code has been migrated to plugin/claude-cli/.

activities.title: Verify no residual imports
activities.description: grep -r for 'anthropic.ts' and './anthropic' in plugin/ directory. Must be zero matches.

arrows.label: ClaudeNativeAuthPlugin wraps the plugin, not replaces it
